Boosts the power of @type@ moves by @amo: Boosts the power of @type@ moves by @amount*100@%.
@type@ moves have a @statusChance*100@%: @type@ moves have a @statusChance*100@% chance to inflict @status@.
Gain a @boostChance*100@% chance of rais: Gain a @boostChance*100@% chance of raising @stats@ when a Pokémon enters a battle.
Gain a @boostChance*100@% chance of raising @stats@ when a Pokémon enters a battle. Additionally, gain a @bonusChance*100@% chance to increase @stats@ every turn.
All @type@ moves have a @statusChance*10: All @type@ moves have a @statusChance*100@% chance to inflict @status@.
Opponents that flinch take @damage*100@%: Opponents that flinch take @damage*100@% max HP damage.
Gain a @boostChance*100@% chance of rais: Gain a @boostChance*100@% chance of raising @stats@ when a Pokémon enters a battle. Gain a @bonusChance*100@% chance to instead raise @stats@ to @bonusBoost@.
All moves have a @statusChance*100@% cha: All moves have a @statusChance*100@% chance to apply a @status@, dealing @damage*100@% max Health every turn.
All moves have a @statusChance*100@% chance to inflict @status@.
All moves have a @statusChance*100@% chance to inflict @status@. Enemies also gain an additional @hitBonus*100@% chance to hit themselves in Confusion.
All moves have a @hitChance*100@% chance: All moves have a @hitChance*100@% chance to strike again at @damageReduction*100@% damage.
All moves have a @hitChance*100@% chance to strike again at @damageReduction*100@% damage. Gain an additional @bonusProcChance*100@% chance to strike @bonusProcHits@ more time(s).
